examples.title: Algorithm: Linked List Traversal
examples.description: Traversing a linked list from head to tail
examples.code:
ALGORITHM TraverseList
INPUT: head (pointer to first node)
OUTPUT: none

BEGIN
 current = head
 WHILE current != NULL
 PRINT current.data
 current = current.next
 END WHILE
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step traversal of a linked list, printing each node's data
